summary: Konekt Assignment & Notifications Seed Pack (v134) - All features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified via Playwright. 3 demo sales users exist and can login. Customer orders show real sales contact (Neema Mallya, Brian Kweka, Janeth Msuya). Admin invoices show SEPARATED customer_name and payer_name columns. Admin orders show real sales names in 'Assigned Sales' column. Track Order CTA appears in customer invoice drawer for paid invoices with order_id.

minor.issue: Demo sales users had 'password' field instead of 'password_hash' - FIXED by updating login to check both fields

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 883 - login to check both password and password_hash fields)
seed_data_creation: 3 demo sales users seeded: Janeth Msuya, Brian Kweka, Neema Mallya
context_for_next_testing_agent: Konekt Assignment & Notifications Seed Pack v134 fully tested. Key features: (1) 3 demo sales users exist with role=sales and can login. (2) Customer orders show real sales contact with name, phone, email - NOT 'Konekt Sales Team' placeholder. (3) Admin invoices show SEPARATED customer_name (from customer record) and payer_name (from payment proof). (4) Admin orders show real sales names in 'Assigned Sales' column. (5) Track Order CTA appears in customer invoice drawer for paid invoices with order_id. (6) Notification builders target correct URLs: customer→/account/invoices, vendor→/partner/orders, sales→/staff/orders. (7) Sales auto-assignment checks customer's existing rep first, then pool. (8) Vendor auto-assignment from product owner/uploader. Minor fix applied: login now checks both 'password' and 'password_hash' fields for demo sales users.
